app.title: Crop Disease AI - Smart Agriculture
app.main_subtitle: Intelligent disease detection · Smart recommendations · Weather-based risk analysis
sidebar.name: Name
home.header_subtitle: Intelligent disease detection · Smart treatment recommendations · Weather-based risk analysis
home.feature_ai_desc: Upload leaf images for instant disease diagnosis using deep learning with >95% accuracy across 15+ crops.
home.feature_weather_desc: Real-time weather monitoring and 7-day disease risk forecasting powered by OpenWeather API.
home.feature_treatment_desc: Personalized chemical and organic treatment recommendations based on disease, severity, and weather.
home.feature_analytics_desc: Interactive dashboards with disease trends, crop health reports, and exportable analytics.
home.feature_pdf_desc: Generate comprehensive diagnostic reports with images, analysis, and treatment plans.
home.feature_xai_desc: Understand why each diagnosis was made with confidence analysis and visual heatmaps.
home.step1_desc: Take a photo or upload a leaf image of your crop
home.step2_desc: Our CNN model analyzes the image for disease patterns
home.step3_desc: Receive instant disease identification with confidence score
home.step4_desc: Get personalized chemical and organic recommendations
home.step5_desc: Monitor conditions and assess disease risk for 7 days
home.step6_desc: Download comprehensive PDF report for your records
home.cta_desc: Protect your crops, maximize yields, and make data-driven farming decisions.
home.welcome_title: Welcome to the Future of Farming
home.welcome_desc: Leverage the power of Artificial Intelligence and Computer Vision to protect your crops and maximize yields. Our system can detect diseases from leaf images, analyze severity, provide treatment recommendations, and predict future disease risks based on weather conditions.
home.quick_tip_desc: Upload a clear, well-lit photo of the affected leaf for the most accurate diagnosis. Capture from multiple angles if possible.
home.cta_ready_desc: Navigate to Disease Detection to begin analyzing your crops.
home.quick_action_detect_desc: Analyze crop leaf images for disease detection
home.quick_action_analytics_desc: Track disease trends and crop health metrics
home.quick_action_history_desc: View past detection records and reports
home.quick_action_about_desc: Learn about the system and how to use it
detection.title: 🔬 AI Disease Detection
detection.subtitle: Upload a leaf image to detect diseases with AI-powered analysis
detection.crop_low_confidence: Crop confidence ({confidence}%) below 95% threshold. Select crop manually or accept auto-detected crop.
detection.waiting_upload: 👆 Upload or capture an image to start detection
detection.waiting_click: Click 'Detect Disease' to analyze the image
detection.low_confidence_warning: ⚠️ **Low Confidence Prediction** — Confidence is {confidence}%. Please upload a clearer image for better accuracy.
detection.unknown_crop_warning: Could not identify the crop type with sufficient confidence. Consider uploading a clearer image or selecting the crop manually.
detection.raw_model_caption: What the neural network predicted before crop consistency check
detection.error_model: Model prediction failed. Please try again.
analytics.title: 📊 Analytics Dashboard
analytics.subtitle: Comprehensive insights into crop health, disease patterns, and farm analytics
analytics.no_data: No disease data available yet. Start detecting to populate analytics.
analytics.no_monthly_data: Monthly trend data will appear as you perform disease detection scans.
analytics.no_health_data: Health distribution will appear after first detection.
analytics.no_history: No detection history yet. Go to Detection page to analyze crops.
analytics.no_daily_data: Daily analytics will populate as you use the system.
analytics.no_insights: Start detecting diseases to see insights.
kb.title: 📖 Disease Knowledge Base
kb.subtitle: Comprehensive information about crop diseases, symptoms, causes, and treatments
weather.title: 🌤️ Weather Intelligence System
weather.subtitle: Real-time weather monitoring, disease risk prediction, and smart farming recommendations
weather.api_not_configured: ⚠️ OpenWeather API key not configured. Weather data will use simulated values. Add `OPENWEATHER_API_KEY=your_key` to `.env` file for real weather data.
weather.fetch_error: Unable to fetch weather data. Check your API key or try again later.
weather.risk_select_prompt: Select a crop and generate risk prediction.
weather.no_logs: No weather logs yet. Weather data is logged automatically when you check conditions.
history.title: 📋 Detection History
history.subtitle: View and manage all crop disease detection records and reports
history.no_records: No detection records found. Start by detecting diseases on the Detection page.
history.delete_unavailable: Delete functionality is available through database management tools.
about.title: ℹ️ About the System
about.subtitle: AI-Driven Crop Disease Prediction and Management System
about.overview_desc: The AI-Driven Crop Disease Prediction and Management System is a modern AgriTech web application that leverages artificial intelligence to help farmers detect crop diseases early, receive treatment recommendations, monitor weather conditions, and make data-driven farming decisions.
about.overview_tech: Built with Streamlit, TensorFlow, and Computer Vision, the system can identify diseases across 15+ crops with high accuracy, analyze disease severity, predict future disease risks based on weather conditions, and generate comprehensive PDF reports.
about.feature_ai_desc: CNN-based disease classification with confidence scoring across 15+ crops
about.feature_weather_desc: Real-time weather monitoring and 7-day disease risk prediction
about.feature_treatment_desc: Personalized chemical and organic treatment recommendations
about.feature_analytics_desc: Interactive dashboards with disease trends and crop health reports
about.feature_pdf_desc: Comprehensive diagnostic reports with images and analysis
about.feature_xai_desc: Transparent predictions with confidence analysis and visual explanations
about.feature_db_desc: SQLite-based record keeping for predictions, weather, and analytics
about.feature_kb_desc: Comprehensive disease information with search and filter capabilities
about.step1_desc: Take a photo or upload a leaf image of your crop
about.step2_desc: Receive instant disease identification with severity analysis
about.step3_desc: Follow treatment recommendations and monitor disease risk
about.cta_desc: Making advanced crop disease detection accessible to everyone, helping protect food security and improve farming outcomes.
about.footer: Version 1.0.0 | Built with ❤️ for the global farming community
